metadata.title: Fibidy — Open your store. Sell today.
metadata.description: The fastest way for Indonesian creators and small businesses to launch a digital storefront. Build your catalog, share your link, customers order via WhatsApp. Free forever to start.

announcement.messageDesktop: 🚀 Open your store free in 5 minutes — no card needed.
announcement.messageMobile: 🚀 Open your store free in 5 minutes.

hero.headline: Open your store. Sell today.
hero.subheadline: Build your catalog, share your link, and take orders on WhatsApp.
hero.trustLine: Free forever to start · 5 minutes to launch · WhatsApp-first ordering

commission.title: Marketplaces eat 20% of every order
commission.description: Your hard work shouldn't fund someone else's growth. Keep more of what you earn.

expensiveSlow.title: Custom websites are slow and pricey
expensiveSlow.description: Quotes start at Rp 5 million and take weeks to ship. By then the trend is gone.

notLocal.title: Tools weren't built for Indonesia
notLocal.description: Foreign platforms charge in USD, ignore WhatsApp, and don't speak your customers' language.

features.headline: Everything you need to start selling.
features.subheadline: Four building blocks that turn an idea into your first sale today. No fluff, no busywork.

channels.title: Reach every channel from one link

scale.headline: Built to scale with you.
scale.subheadline: From your first sale to your hundredth store. Fibidy's infrastructure grows alongside you — no servers to manage, no certificates to renew, no surprises.

infiniteDomains.title: Unlimited domains
infiniteDomains.description: Run as many storefronts as you need on Fibidy subdomains, and bring your own custom domain when you're ready. Every store is secured with free SSL, automatically.

instantSsl.title: Instant SSL certificates
instantSsl.description: Free SSL for every storefront in under five seconds — including your custom domains. HTTPS is active from the moment you press launch.

zeroMaintenance.title: Zero maintenance
zeroMaintenance.description: Never worry about renewing a certificate, patching a server, or paying for hosting. We handle the boring parts so you can focus on selling.

howItWorks.headline: From idea to first sale, in 5 minutes.
howItWorks.subheadline: Three small steps. No coding. No platform middleman.

build.title: Pick a template, make it yours
build.description: Choose from designer-curated storefront templates. Swap the colors, edit the copy — every change shows up live. No drag-drop puzzles, no blank canvas.

share.title: Drop your link anywhere
share.description: your-name.fibidy.com works in WhatsApp, Instagram bios, TikTok captions, email signatures. Customers tap once and they're already shopping.

sell.title: Take orders right in WhatsApp
sell.description: Customer taps Order, you reply with payment details, ship it out. No card friction, no platform middleman — you handle the conversation, you handle the money.

pricing.headline: Three plans. One ladder. Honest pricing.
pricing.subheadline: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. Same plans you see post-signup — no surprise upsells.
pricing.roadmapNote: Digital downloads, KYC payouts, and the per-tier platform fees are still being polished. Marked as Coming Soon below — we'll switch them on for everyone at the same time when those features ship.

storeBuilder.eyebrow: Try it first, sign up later
storeBuilder.headline: Your store, in 30 seconds. See it live.
storeBuilder.subheadline: Pick a category, claim your address, watch your storefront build itself. No signup until you like what you see.

states.available: Available! Your store is ready to launch.
states.invalid: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
states.reserved: This name is reserved by the system.
states.lockedHint: Pick a category first to claim your address.
states.toastNeedCategory: Pick a category first to continue

restaurant.tagline: Today's specials, delivered straight to your table or your door.

coffeeshop.tagline: Single-origin beans, brewed fresh and ready to ship.

fashion.tagline: New drops every week, styled for the way you actually live.

beautySalon.tagline: Book your next look — hair, nails, glow, all in one place.

cleaning.tagline: A spotless home, on demand. Book a slot in under a minute.

retail.tagline: Daily essentials, your favorite picks — delivered fast.

categoryGate.title: Pick a category first
categoryGate.content: Then we can claim your store address.

storeBuilder.trustLine: Sign up in 2 minutes · No credit card needed

isFree.a: Yes — the Free plan is free forever, no card required, no trial expiry. You can run a real storefront on it indefinitely. Paid plans (Starter / Business) unlock higher limits and lower platform fees when you're ready to scale.

paymentNoStripe.a: Customers tap 'Order via WhatsApp' on your storefront — you take it from there. Bank transfer, OVO, GoPay, COD — whatever works for you and the customer. Fibidy doesn't touch the money. Direct payouts via Stripe IDR are coming as part of the Business plan roadmap.

customDomain.q: Can I use my own domain?
customDomain.a: Yes — Fibidy supports custom domains. Point tokomu.com at us and we'll handle the rest. Or stay on your-name.fibidy.com — your call.

paidPlans.a: Starter (Rp 35.000/month) gives you 20 products, 3 photos each, and a 5% platform fee. Business (Rp 149.000/month) bumps that to 50 products, 5 photos each, and a 2% fee. Direct Stripe IDR payouts and digital product downloads are on the way.

fibidyVsLinktree.q: How is Fibidy different from Linktree?
fibidyVsLinktree.a: Linktree is a list of links. Fibidy is a real catalog: product photos, prices, categories, search, custom domain — all built in. Plus customers can order from you directly via WhatsApp, not bounce to another site.

whatToSell.q: What can I sell on Fibidy?
whatToSell.a: Physical goods (fashion, food, crafts), services (coaching, consultations, salon, studio time) — anything customers can buy from you via WA today. Digital products (templates, ebooks, courses) are coming with paid plans.

dataExport.q: Can I export my products if I leave?
dataExport.a: Yes. Your data is yours. CSV export of all your products is on the roadmap; in the meantime, our team helps any seller migrate out manually if they ask.

migrate.q: Can I move from another platform?
migrate.a: Yes. Bring your product photos, descriptions, and prices over — Fibidy doesn't lock you in. Sellers get hands-on migration help: ping us and we'll do the lifting.

finalCta.headline: Start today. Your store is ready in 5 minutes.
finalCta.subheadline: Free forever to start. No credit card. Order via WhatsApp from day one.
finalCta.trustLine: Already have an account? Sign in from the menu above.

footer.tagline: The fastest way to launch your storefront in Indonesia.

softwareApp.name: Fibidy
softwareApp.description: Open your storefront in 5 minutes. Build your catalog, share your link, and let customers order via WhatsApp. Free forever to start, for Indonesian creators and small businesses.
